# UC-22.50.5 · MAS TRM §11.1.1 system resilience — RTO/RPO burn-rate evidence

## Description

Reconciles measured RTO/RPO against contractual targets across critical services so MAS TRM §11.1.1 resilience is demonstrated.

## Value

MAS TRM §11.1.1 requires FI boards to be satisfied with resilience outcomes; automated RTO/RPO reconciliation is auditor-friendly evidence.

## Implementation

(1) Maintain rto_rpo_targets.csv per service_id; (2) ITSI pushes measured values into service summary; (3) schedule weekly report to the board.

## Detailed Implementation

Prerequisites
• Install and configure the required add-on or app: Splunk Enterprise / Splunk Cloud Platform.
• Ensure the following data sources are available: ITSI KPI service health, infrastructure uptime, DR test records..
• For app installation, inputs.conf, and Splunk directory layout, see the Implementation guide: docs/implementation-guide.md

Step 1 — Configure data collection
(1) Maintain rto_rpo_targets.csv per service_id; (2) ITSI pushes measured values into service summary; (3) schedule weekly report to the board.

Step 2 — Create the search and alert
Run the following SPL in Search (then save as report or alert; adjust time range and threshold as needed):

```spl
| inputlookup rto_rpo_targets.csv
| eval target_rto_min=coalesce(target_rto_min, 60), target_rpo_min=coalesce(target_rpo_min, 15)
| map search="| rest /services/data/models/$service_id$/summary | eval measured_rto_min=measured_rto_min, measured_rpo_min=measured_rpo_min | eval service_id=\"$service_id$\""
| eval rto_breach=if(measured_rto_min > target_rto_min, "yes", "no"), rpo_breach=if(measured_rpo_min > target_rpo_min, "yes", "no")
| table service_id, target_rto_min, measured_rto_min, rto_breach, target_rpo_min, measured_rpo_min, rpo_breach
```

Understanding this SPL

**MAS TRM §11.1.1 system resilience — RTO/RPO burn-rate evidence** — MAS TRM §11.1.1 requires FI boards to be satisfied with resilience outcomes; automated RTO/RPO reconciliation is auditor-friendly evidence.

Documented **Data sources**: ITSI KPI service health, infrastructure uptime, DR test records. **App/TA** (typical add-on context): Splunk Enterprise / Splunk Cloud Platform. The SPL below should target the same indexes and sourcetypes you configured for that feed—rename `index=` / `sourcetype=` if your deployment differs.

**Pipeline walkthrough**

• Loads rows via `inputlookup` (KV store or CSV lookup) for enrichment or reporting.
• `eval` defines or adjusts **target_rto_min** — applying business logic to classify, threshold, or derive compliance-relevant indicators.
• Runs a templated search per row with `map`.
• `eval` defines or adjusts **rto_breach** — applying business logic to classify, threshold, or derive compliance-relevant indicators.

Output fields: measured_rpo_min, measured_rto_min, rpo_breach, rto_breach, service_id, target_rpo_min, target_rto_min.

Step 3 — Validate
Compare with the GRC system and the audit register, and with the crosswalk for the tier-2 framework clause, so monitoring evidence matches the mapped control.

Step 4 — Operationalize
Add the search to a dashboard or set up alert actions (email, webhook, PagerDuty, etc.) as required. Document the use case in your runbook and assign an owner. Consider visualizations: Table of flagged records for investigation; single-value KPI of coverage / compliance percentage; time chart of trend over the last 90 days; drill-down per responsible owner.

## SPL

```spl
| inputlookup rto_rpo_targets.csv
| eval target_rto_min=coalesce(target_rto_min, 60), target_rpo_min=coalesce(target_rpo_min, 15)
| map search="| rest /services/data/models/$service_id$/summary | eval measured_rto_min=measured_rto_min, measured_rpo_min=measured_rpo_min | eval service_id=\"$service_id$\""
| eval rto_breach=if(measured_rto_min > target_rto_min, "yes", "no"), rpo_breach=if(measured_rpo_min > target_rpo_min, "yes", "no")
| table service_id, target_rto_min, measured_rto_min, rto_breach, target_rpo_min, measured_rpo_min, rpo_breach
```

## Visualization

Table of flagged records for investigation; single-value KPI of coverage / compliance percentage; time chart of trend over the last 90 days; drill-down per responsible owner. Key fields: `measured_rpo_min`, `measured_rto_min`, `rpo_breach`, `rto_breach`, `service_id`, `target_rpo_min`.
